title: Oil gains as inventories fall further in the US
section_path: Oil gains as inventories fall further in the US
section_path_text: Oil gains as inventories fall further in the US
summary:
Main
Heavy selling in equity markets triggered a risk-off tone across the commodity sector. Falling inventories helped limit the losses. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-07-25 124906.png | assets/2024-07-25_p0zw5kufu35sbekqkyt8u18mez1yz0_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_daf61f4856e1.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil rallied after a sharp fall in US inventories eased concerns about demand.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Heavy selling in equity markets triggered a risk-off tone across the commodity sector. Falling inventories helped limit the losses.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil rallied after a sharp fall in US inventories eased concerns about demand. The Energy Information Administration said US oil stockpiles were drawn down by 3.74mbbls last week.
